title: AI Builder Infrastructure
summary: Published 88CN projects that help builders evaluate AI development, model workflow, and infrastructure options from public signals.
inclusionCriteria: Projects must be manually selected from reviewed local 88CN records, have published status, and include public source links relevant to AI builder infrastructure discovery.
whyIncluded: Aurora Code, Nucleus ML, and VectorBase are published local records with public sources and builder-facing infrastructure context.
methodologyNote: Vertical asset grids are finite discovery pages backed by reviewed local project records. They are not generated from query parameters, external crawls, broad templates, or arbitrary tags.
boundaryNote: This page is a project discovery surface. It does not provide professional, legal, financial, medical, investment, compliance, or security advice.

title: Model and Search Infrastructure
summary: Published 88CN projects related to model workflow, vector search, and infrastructure review from public source material.
inclusionCriteria: Projects must be manually selected from reviewed local 88CN records, have published status, and include public source links tied to model or search infrastructure review.
whyIncluded: Nucleus ML and VectorBase are published local records with public sources and infrastructure-oriented product positioning.
methodologyNote: This grid groups related published projects for discovery only. It does not recalculate scores, infer private adoption data, or recommend technical architecture decisions.
boundaryNote: This page is not a professional advisory surface and must not be used as legal, financial, medical, investment, compliance, or security guidance.

title: Analytics and Operations Tools
summary: Published 88CN projects with public product context around analytics, operations, or readiness workflows.
inclusionCriteria: Projects must be manually selected from reviewed local 88CN records, have published status, and include public source links relevant to analytics or operations workflow discovery.

boundaryNote: Compliance-related project context is discovery-only and does not provide regulated guidance, assurance, or implementation steps.
